历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 4522, 8579, 8356, 6015, and 6693 respectively. From 2021 to 2022, the ranking dropped significantly by about 4057 places, remained basically stable in 2023, rebounded noticeably to 6015 in 2024, and then slightly dropped to 6693 in 2025. In the past three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated within the range of 6015–8579, with a baseline of about 6693 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science (including physics category) in Shanxi Province: 2021: 202 students, 2022: 194, 2023: 194, 2024: 207, 2025: 199; the 2026 physics category plan is 190 students, a decrease of 9 students compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 4.5%). The reduction in enrollment means slightly intensified competition, which pushes the ranking upward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 22nd on the main list, with stable rankings in the 21st–22nd range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly affected by the lingering public opinion from the 2019 study partner incident. Douyin popularity ranking is 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure and relatively high application attention. From 2022 to 2024, reputation evaluations were all somewhat negative/clearly negative, involving incidents such as admission cutoff anomalies and self-investigation of academic misconduct, which had a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. No abnormal admission cutoff records for 2026 have been seen. Shandong University has 19 A- and above disciplines, including Mathematics (A+), Chinese Language and Literature (A), Marxist Theory (A), Control Science and Engineering (A), Clinical Medicine (A-), Law (A-), Electrical Engineering (A-), Software Engineering (A-), and Pharmacy (A-), with strong disciplinary strength. Advantageous disciplines such as Mathematics, Clinical Medicine, Law, and Electrical Engineering highly correspond to the popular majors recruited in Shanxi Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high/highly recommended social popularity; Clinical Medicine and Stomatology have stable and somewhat high popularity; Law and Chinese Language/Literature have somewhat high and recommended popularity. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in Shanxi Province is about 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 compared to 173,347 in 2025 (a decrease of about 3.4%), which slightly alleviates competition. Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province (and Qingdao campus), geographically adjacent to Shanxi Province with convenient transportation, offering some regional appeal to Shanxi examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 4.7%–5.1% (2025), which is a moderately high proportion among cross-province enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6693, the 2026 physics category enrollment reduction of about 4.5% (pushing ranking upward), the decrease in Shanxi physics category examinees by about 3.4% (alleviating competition), the somewhat negative reputation (slightly pushing ranking upward), and the high university level (985/Soft Science 22nd, attracting high-quality students), it is expected that the 2026 minimum ranking will slightly move forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 6541, with a range of 6041–7041.

For rankings significantly above the upper limit (e.g., within 6000), prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the lower limit (e.g., around 7000), mainly target Tier 2 core majors with Tier 3 as safety.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, Chinese Language/Literature and other liberal arts majors are socially hot and recommended; Economics is differentiated and wait-and-see; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年山东大学在山西省医学类最低录取位次分别为：2021年4387名（计划25人）、2022年8579名（计划26人）、2023年8162名（计划27人）、2024年6015名（计划29人） 、2025年6102名（计划16人）。2026年医学类招生计划为23人，较2025年的16人扩招7人，增幅约43.75%，扩招幅度较大，将显著拉低录取门槛。从位次走势看，2022-2023年位次 处于8000+高位，2024-2025年回升至6000左右，呈现先降后升的V型走势。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校（A类），综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科源自齐鲁大学医学院，拥有百年 办学历史，齐鲁医学品牌在华北地区乃至全国享有盛誉，对山西省高分考生具有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业近年来报考热度持续走高，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争尤为激烈。山东大学位于山东省会济南市，地理位置优越，交通便利，对山西省考生吸引力较强。202 6年医学类总计划23人，虽较2025年大幅扩招，但绝对数量仍有限，竞争依然激烈。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型及历年位次趋势，预测2026年山东大学在山西省医学类最低录取位次约为7654名，波动区间为7271-8037名。由于2026年扩招43.75%，位次较2025年的6102名 明显下降（录取难度降低），但医学报考热度持续上升部分抵消了扩招效应，实际位次略高于纯公式计算结果。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shandong University's medical programs in Shanxi Province were: 2021: 4387th (planned 25 students), 2022: 8579th (planned 26 students), 2023: 8162nd (planned 27 students), 2024: 6015th (planned 29 students), 2025: 6102nd (planned 16 students). In 2026, the medical enrollment plan is 23 students, an increase of 7 students compared to 2025's 16, a growth of approximately 43.75%, which is a significant expansion that will notably lower the admission threshold. Looking at the ranking trend, the rankings were at a high of 8000+ in 2022-2023, then rebounded to around 6000 in 2024-2025, showing a V-shaped pattern of first declining and then rising.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and has been selected as a Double First-Class construction university (Category A), with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines originate from the Qilu Medical College of Shandong University, with a century-long history. The Qilu medical brand enjoys a high reputation in North China and even nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates from Shanxi Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, the popularity of medical programs has continued to rise, with core programs such as Clinical Medicine and Stomatology being particularly competitive. Shandong University is located in Jinan, the capital of Shandong Province, with a superior geographical location and convenient transportation, which strongly attracts candidates from Shanxi Province. In 2026, the total medical enrollment plan is 23 students. Although it has significantly expanded compared to 2025, the absolute number is still limited, and competition remains fierce.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the M3 supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's medical programs in Shanxi Province in 2026 will be approximately 7654th, with a fluctuation range of 7271-8037. Due to the 43.75% enrollment expansion in 2026, the ranking will significantly decrease compared to 2025's 6102nd (reducing admission difficulty), but the continuously rising popularity of medical programs partially offsets the expansion effect, resulting in an actual ranking slightly higher than the pure formula calculation.

- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 programs, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) and Stomatology programs offer good value, while Pharmaceutical Sciences can serve as a stable backup.
